reviews_5s:
We purchased this to measure 2 oz cream to pre-heat when making coffee in a thermal mug. The little handle is just the right size and configuration. For this purpose, we don't need the detailed measurements and would have preferred larger type font. But, we've learned the marking for this nightly measure. Overall, a great replacement. Since we anticipate future accidents, we bought two more to have on hand. They're so small, I wouldn't recommend washing in a dishwasher. Easy enough to wash by hand.I needed a small measuring cup for my laundry area to measure bleach and fabric softener. This works perfectly for my needs and is great quality. It also looks great as well! I highly recommend purchasing this item!My son uses this to heat his syrup up in the microwave. We just stick it in the dishwasher to clean, and it's held up great. The glass is kind of thin. It looks and feels easy to break but so far so good. It is a bit pricey for what it is, but the product is handy to use.Great size for a jigger or to heat maple syrup for pancakes.
I don’t care for the double handles, a minor issue for me.Let me just disclose that I'm not actually even using the volume-based measurement here for gauging the output of my espresso shots. Weight-based is much more widely used for good reason, but sometimes the volume display is useful such as measuring out a syrup for a flavored espresso drink. That said, the reason this cup is useful for shots for me is that it's just the right size and shape to capture a shot, the handle is really perfect for pouring the shot into a cup, and the spout is ideal for pouring out the shot and getting as much of the crema out as possible. I had been using a 2 oz measuring cup from Target or WalMart which just had a rounded top, and this is so much better.Fine!Very nice, would love a version with a single spout opposite the handlePlay Video
Love this small glass measuring cup! It’s perfect in every way. I especially love the two pour spouts. Highly recommend.I have a cheap espresso machine so I didn't want to spend a ton of money on accessories, but this little measurer was a game changer! My machine doesn't measure automatically, so I had just been guessing how much espresso to pull. My lattes taste so much better now and you really can't beat the price.I needed a double jigger for my bar cart. This glass measure was perfect for the job. Measuring marks are well defined and the glass is easy to clean
reviews_1s:
This becomes useless after only a few washings. The measurement markings disappear. Don’t waste your money. I replaced it with an Oxo, which is a long-lasting, quality product.Even though the product description states the product is ‘dishwasher’ safe, after a couple washes in the dishwasher, the measurement indications have completely wore off. Not sure why a measuring cup manufacturer would not consider this. It’s not like we are building rockets here.This is the second one of these that I've ordered... the handles break on them VERY easily. Admittedly, I"m a bit of a klutz in the kitchen, but not that bad! I decided to keep this second one, the handle broke with stubs on each end, very sharp. My husband sanded both sides smooth, so we still use it relatively successfully. I don't dare put it in the dishwasher, lest the numbers get rubbed off like some say happens. Don't know that I can recommend this.Worked just fine until one day the measurements on the outside of the glass came right off with a light wipe. Just outside the return window unfortunately. Avoid purchasing this glass if you are looking for something that requires the measurements to not disappear.Was happy when the product arrived until I looked closely at it. The markings for different measurements have no sort of consistency. A measuring cup that can't accurately measure is useless.I’ve had this for a couple weeks and all of the measuring lines are gone. If you are buying this for measuring anything I do not recommend.The markings washed off after two rounds in the top rack of the dishwasher.

Previous review:
The cup did the job, but I was wary of the thinness of the glass. Even though I attempted to be careful, one of the spouts broke.After just a few washings in the dishwasher the printing has washed off. What good is a measuring cup without the measure marks on it??? I don’t know how much 1 ½ oz or 2 oz is any longer. Don’t waste your moneyThe measuring cup was great but we washed it 2 times in the top rack of our dishwasher and all the print washed off. We can now no longer see to measure with it.the volume level marks were not printed on correctly , crooked
